name: Detective Lawrence
author: Poki
description: Detective Lawrence is an adventure and puzzle game that pulls you into a world of mystery and cosmic horror. Step into the shoes of Detective Lawrence as he follows a cryptic letter from an old friend, only to uncover the terrifying secret of the Cosmic Machine—a device that opens portals to other dimensions. Solve clever puzzles, unravel dark secrets, and face chilling unknowns in a story that twists reality itself. Are you ready to uncover the truth… no matter how terrifying it is? How to play Detective Lawrence? Move: A/D or the left and right arrow keys Interact with items: W or the up arrow key Use the mouse to solve puzzles! Who created Detective Lawrence? Detective Lawrence is created by FM Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 2 , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 3 , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4 , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 5 , Forgotten Hill Memento: Playground , Forgotten Hill Memento: Love Beyond , Forgotten Hill Memento: Buried Things , Forgotten Hill: Puppeteer , Forgotten Hill: Fall , Forgotten Hill: Surgery , Little Cabin in the Woods and Pixel Volley ! How can I play Detective Lawrence for free? You can play Detective Lawrence for free on Poki. Can I play Detective Lawrence on mobile devices and desktop? Detective Lawrence can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
